title: Ancient Hebrew in the Context of the Neighboring Languages: Canaanite and Ugaritic
further_info: Recommended Reading This will be announced at the seminar. Recommended introduction: Gzella, Holger (ed.), Languages of the Old Testament, 2nd revised edition, Darmstadt 2012; 490 GZELL (HfJS), or 2012 A 7528 (UB). For the applicability of the course in different degree programs, please refer to the information under ‘Module / Applicability in Degree Programs’ in the Annotated Course Catalog (KVV) of the HfJS.
